revision.text:
'''癸卯'''（みずのとう、きぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて40番目で、前は[[壬寅]]、次は[[甲辰]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（水生木）である。
==癸卯の年==
==癸卯の日== ===[[選日]]=== 癸卯の日は[[天一天上]]の11日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸卯'''（みずのとう、きすいのうさぎ、きすいのう、きぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの40番目で、前は[[壬寅]]、次は[[甲辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==癸卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って43が余る年が癸卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[43年]] *[[103年]] *[[163年]] *[[223年]] *[[283年]] *[[343年]] *[[403年]] *[[463年]] *[[523年]] *[[583年]] *[[643年]] *[[703年]] *[[763年]] *[[823年]] *[[883年]] *[[943年]] | *[[1003年]] *[[1063年]] *[[1123年]] *[[1183年]] *[[1243年]] *[[1303年]] *[[1363年]] *[[1423年]] *[[1483年]] *[[1543年]] *[[1603年]] *[[1663年]] *[[1723年]] *[[1783年]] *[[1843年]] *[[1903年]] *[[1963年]] | *[[2023年]] *[[2083年]] *[[2143年]] *[[2203年]] *[[2263年]] *[[2323年]] *[[2383年]] *[[2443年]] *[[2503年]] *[[2563年]] *[[2623年]] *[[2683年]] *[[2743年]] *[[2803年]] *[[2863年]] *[[2923年]] *[[2983年]] |}
==癸卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[2月]]が癸卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸卯の日== ===選日=== 癸卯の日は[[天一天上]]の11日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:癸卯]]

{{干支}} '''癸卯'''（みずのとう、きすいのうさぎ、きすいのう、きぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの40番目で、前は[[壬寅]]、次は[[甲辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==癸卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って43が余る年が癸卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[43年]] *[[103年]] *[[163年]] *[[223年]] *[[283年]] *[[343年]] *[[403年]] *[[463年]] *[[523年]] *[[583年]] *[[643年]] *[[703年]] *[[763年]] *[[823年]] *[[883年]] *[[943年]] | *[[1003年]] *[[1063年]] *[[1123年]] *[[1183年]] *[[1243年]] *[[1303年]] *[[1363年]] *[[1423年]] *[[1483年]] *[[1543年]] *[[1603年]] *[[1663年]] *[[1723年]] *[[1783年]] *[[1843年]] *[[1903年]] *[[1963年]] | *[[2023年]] *[[2083年]] *[[2143年]] *[[2203年]] *[[2263年]] *[[2323年]] *[[2383年]] *[[2443年]] *[[2503年]] *[[2563年]] *[[2623年]] *[[2683年]] *[[2743年]] *[[2803年]] *[[2863年]] *[[2923年]] *[[2983年]] |}
==癸卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[2月]]が癸卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸卯の日== ===選日=== 癸卯の日は[[天一天上]]の11日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:癸卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:癸卯]]

==癸卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って43が余る年が癸卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[43年]] *[[103年]] *[[163年]] *[[223年]] *[[283年]] *[[343年]] *[[403年]] *[[463年]] *[[523年]] *[[583年]] *[[643年]] *[[703年]] *[[763年]] *[[823年]] *[[883年]] *[[943年]] | *[[1003年]] *[[1063年]] *[[1123年]] *[[1183年]] *[[1243年]] *[[1303年]] *[[1363年]] *[[1423年]] *[[1483年]] *[[1543年]] *[[1603年]] *[[1663年]] *[[1723年]] *[[1783年]] *[[1843年]] *[[1903年]] *[[1963年]] | *[[2023年]] *[[2083年]] *[[2143年]] *[[2203年]] *[[2263年]] *[[2323年]] *[[2383年]] *[[2443年]] *[[2503年]] *[[2563年]] *[[2623年]] *[[2683年]] *[[2743年]] *[[2803年]] *[[2863年]] *[[2923年]] *[[2983年]] |}
==癸卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[2月]]が癸卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸卯の日== ===選日=== 癸卯の日は[[天一天上]]の11日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|みすのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:癸卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:癸卯]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=Yin Water Rabbit}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Rabbit also known as 癸卯'''（みずのとう、きすいのうさぎ、きすいのう、きぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの40番目で、前は[[壬寅]]、次は[[甲辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==癸卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って43が余る年が癸卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[43年]] *[[103年]] *[[163年]] *[[223年]] *[[283年]] *[[343年]] *[[403年]] *[[463年]] *[[523年]] *[[583年]] *[[643年]] *[[703年]] *[[763年]] *[[823年]] *[[883年]] *[[943年]] | *[[1003年]] *[[1063年]] *[[1123年]] *[[1183年]] *[[1243年]] *[[1303年]] *[[1363年]] *[[1423年]] *[[1483年]] *[[1543年]] *[[1603年]] *[[1663年]] *[[1723年]] *[[1783年]] *[[1843年]] *[[1903年]] *[[1963年]] | *[[2023年]] *[[2083年]] *[[2143年]] *[[2203年]] *[[2263年]] *[[2323年]] *[[2383年]] *[[2443年]] *[[2503年]] *[[2563年]] *[[2623年]] *[[2683年]] *[[2743年]] *[[2803年]] *[[2863年]] *[[2923年]] *[[2983年]] |}
==癸卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[2月]]が癸卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸卯の日== ===選日=== 癸卯の日は[[天一天上]]の11日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|みすのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:癸卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Water Rabbit]]

==癸卯の日== ===選日=== 癸卯の日は[[天一天上]]の11日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|みすのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:癸卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Water Rabbit]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Rabbit also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸卯'''（みずのとう、きすいのうさぎ、きすいのう、きぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの40番目で、前は[[壬寅]]、次は[[甲辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。

==癸卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[2月]]が癸卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸卯の日== ===選日=== 癸卯の日は[[天一天上]]の11日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|みすのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[Category:qq]][[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:癸卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Water Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Water Rabbit]] [[ja:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[fr:Lièvre de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hase]] [[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sin-cṳ̄de]][[de:Feuer-Ziegeneen]][[en:Fire Goat]][[fr:Chèvre de feushak]][[it:Sin-chṳ́id]][[ja:Xinwaja]][[ko:신미 (간지)]][[nds:Feuer-Ziegenevi]][[vi:Tân Mùi]][[za:Sincceij]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]][[zh-yue:辛未]][[zh:辛未]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh_yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904471]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig <!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ --> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh-yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904471]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking '''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by <!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by '''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.
