'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода --> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh-yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904471]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh-yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904471]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода ==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода --> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. '''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода <!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking '''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода <!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:43|43]] * [[:en:103|103]] * [[:en:163|163]] * [[:en:223|223]] * [[:en:283|283]] * [[:en:343|343]] * [[:en:403|403]] * [[:en:463|463]] * [[:en:523|523]] * [[:en:583|583]] * [[:en:643|643]] * [[:en:703|703]] * [[:en:763|763]] * [[:en:823|823]] * [[:en:883|883]] * [[:en:943|943]] | * [[:en:1003|1003]] * [[:en:1063|1063]] * [[:en:1123|1123]] * [[:en:1183|1183]] * [[:en:1243|1243]] * [[:en:1303|1303]] * [[:en:1363|1363]] * [[:en:1423|1423]] * [[:en:1483|1483]] * [[:en:1543|1543]] * [[:en:1603|1603]] * [[:en:1663|1663]] * [[:en:1723|1723]] * [[:en:1783|1783]] * [[:en:1843|1843]] * [[:en:1903|1903]] * [[:en:1963|1963]] | * [[:en:2023|2023]] * [[:en:2083|2083]] * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.
