{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig --> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig Elements#Mutual generation}} (Water generates Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
<!-- == * Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit''' |- !{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium}} |- | * {{ill|43|en|43|WD=Q4637890|lt=43}} * {{ill|103|en|103|WD=Q395849|lt=103}} * {{ill|163|en|163|WD=Q30384|lt=163}} * {{ill|223|en|223|WD=Q31243|lt=223}} * {{ill|283|en|283|WD=Q32054|lt=283}} * {{ill|343|en|343|WD=Q32680|lt=343}} * {{ill|403|en|403|WD=Q32757|lt=403}} * {{ill|463|en|463|WD=Q30299|lt=463}} * {{ill|523|en|523|WD=Q31642|lt=523}} * {{ill|583|en|583|WD=Q32183|lt=583}} * {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643}} * {{ill|703|en|703|WD=Q23500|lt=703}} * {{ill|763|en|763|WD=Q30692|lt=763}} * {{ill|823|en|823|WD=Q29944|lt=823}} * {{ill|883|en|883|WD=Q30355|lt=883}} * {{ill|943|en|943|WD=Q24179|lt=943}} | * {{ill|1003|en|1003|WD=Q19224|lt=1003}} * {{ill|1063|en|1063|WD=Q19400|lt=1063}} * {{ill|1123|en|1123|WD=Q23998|lt=1123}} * {{ill|1183|en|1183|WD=Q19723|lt=1183}} * {{ill|1243|en|1243|WD=Q5438|lt=1243}} * {{ill|1303|en|1303|WD=Q5614|lt=1303}} * {{ill|1363|en|1363|WD=Q6176|lt=1363}} * {{ill|1423|en|1423|WD=Q6267|lt=1423}} * {{ill|1483|en|1483|WD=Q6637|lt=1483}} * {{ill|1543|en|1543|WD=Q6523|lt=1543}} * {{ill|1603|en|1603|WD=Q6735|lt=1603}} * {{ill|1663|en|1663|WD=Q7577|lt=1663}} * {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723}} * {{ill|1783|en|1783|WD=Q7745|lt=1783}} * {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843}} * {{ill|1903|en|1903|WD=Q2045|lt=1903}} * {{ill|1963|en|1963|WD=Q2755|lt=1963}} | * {{ill|2023|en|2023|WD=Q49622|lt=2023}} * {{ill|2083|en|2083|WD=Q972505|lt=2083}} * [[:en:2143|2143]] * [[:en:2203|2203]] * [[:en:2263|2263]] * [[:en:2323|2323]] * [[:en:2383|2383]] * [[:en:2443|2443]] * [[2503]] * [[2563]] * [[2623]] * [[2683]] * [[2743]] * [[2803]] * [[2863]] * [[:en:2923|2923]] * [[:en:2983|2983]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.
==Days of Yin Water Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.
